text: Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you here!
Welcome to the community! You've been approved as an event helper. We can't wait to see the events you help organize!
Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to explore and introduce yourself!
Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a mentor. We're excited to have you share your knowledge with others!
